manual.title: Manual setup
manual.description: Connection details for the speaker (SSC protocol, port 45).

data.name: Name (e.g. "KH 120 II Left")
data.interface: Network interface (select from list, or type a custom value if not shown — only needed for link-local addresses)

scan.title: Discovered speakers
scan.description: Select a discovered device, or search again.

reconfigure.title: Change connection details
reconfigure.description: New connection details for {device}. The name, entities and history are kept.

data.interface: Network interface (select from list, or type a custom value if not shown — only needed for link-local addresses)

unsupported.title: Device of another manufacturer
unsupported.description: This device reports itself as "{product}" by "{vendor}" and is not a Neumann speaker. It speaks SSC, so the integration can control it, but anything model-specific (subwoofer entities, EQ layout, factory reset) is a guess and may not match. Submit to add it anyway.

scan_confirm.title: Name the speaker
scan_confirm.description: Device: {device}. Pre-filled if this device had a name before.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the speaker. Check IP address and interface.
error.timeout: Timeout - no response received from the speaker.
error.interface_required_for_link_local: A fe80:: address requires the network interface to be set.
error.invalid_ipv6: Not a valid IPv6 address. Neumann KH speakers only support IPv6 (e.g. fe80::...), not IPv4.
error.no_devices_found: No SSC speakers found on the network. Submit again to retry, or go back and choose manual setup.
error.discovery_expired: The device list has expired, please search again.
error.name_required: Please enter a name for the device.
error.scan_failed: The network scan failed unexpectedly. Try again, or use manual setup.

abort.wrong_device: A different speaker answered at that address (serial number does not match). Nothing was changed.

change_rejected.message: The speaker rejected this change (possibly not supported by this model/firmware): {error}

selection_rejected.message: The speaker rejected this selection (possibly not supported by this model/firmware): {error}

factory_reset_rejected.message: The speaker rejected the factory reset: {error}

eq_reset_rejected.message: The speaker rejected the EQ reset: {error}

name_rejected.message: The speaker rejected the new name: {error}

backup_in_progress.message: A backup is already running, please wait.

discovery_in_progress.message: A discovery is already running, please wait.
